text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Age Peer Networking * Older Adults 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Mental Health Issues Older Adults Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COUNCIL ON AGING OF CENTRAL OREGON CARING CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a social engagement program for seniors through a weekly phone call and/or in person. Trained volunteers are matched with individuals and are background checked. 1036 NE 5th Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Age 60 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 678-5483 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COUNCIL ON AGING OF CENTRAL OREGON CARING CONNECTIONS
